genuine_gaps.accessibility_adaptation: Body-shape adaptations are present; disability- and mobility-specific protocols are sparse.
genuine_gaps.aesthetics_performance: Some decorative architecture and performance cautions; little systematic composition or photography instruction.
genuine_gaps.bottoming_skills: Strong self-advocacy and symptom material, but the author explicitly lacks regular bottoming experience.
genuine_gaps.emergency_procedures: Cutting, fainting, falls, and lowering are covered, but this is not a complete current first-aid curriculum.
genuine_gaps.lineage_history_people: Scattered technique attribution only; no comprehensive history or lineage survey.

source_claim_policy: Source-specific claims are attributed; medical and engineering uncertainty is preserved.
